name: agora
description: Agora — local-first swarm intelligence engine (Neo4j + Ollama)
author: Alexander Schneider <https://alexle135.de>

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check app/__init__.py app/api/runs.py app/models/project.py app/services/run_registry.py app/services/report_agent.py app/services/simulation_manager.py app/services/simulation_runner.py app/services/graph_memory_updater.py app/services/ontology_generator.py app/services/text_processor.py app/utils/api_responses.py app/utils/gpu_probe.py app/utils/json_io.py app/utils/logger.py app/utils/validation.py app/config.py app/storage/embedding_service.py app/storage/ner_extractor.py app/storage/search_service.py app/api/simulation.py app/api/simulation_common.py app/api/simulation_entities.py app/api/simulation_lifecycle.py app/api/simulation_prepare.py app/api/simulation_profiles.py app/api/simulation_run.py app/api/simulation_interviews.py app/api/simulation_history.py app/api/graph.py app/api/report.py app/api/status.py app/utils/retry.py tests/test_api_responses.py tests/test_project_manager.py tests/test_run_registry.py tests/test_validation.py tests/test_simulation_api_routes.py tests/test_embedding_service.py tests/test_report_manager.py tests/test_status.py tests/test_logging.py tests/test_neo4j_resilience.py tests/test_retry.py
scripts.check: npm run lint:backend && npm run test:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run build:frontend
